<!-- Thanks for contributing. Please fill this in and keep the PR focused. -->

## What does this change?

Describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue with "Closes #123".

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:web` succeeds
- [ ] Tested the affected flow manually (describe how)

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused on one thing
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where it makes sense
- [ ] No secrets, build output, or node_modules are committed
- [ ] Documentation was updated if needed
